backend_workflows.detail: covered by the full green backend suite

findings.title: Graph no longer competes with Plan
findings.detail: Manager graph route and nav entry were removed; dependency context now lives inside Plan.

findings.title: Pocket Help is now first-class and persisted
findings.detail: Help requests are stored canonically and linked to dedicated help-request copilot threads.

findings.title: Execution-facing role surfaces are more active-plan anchored
findings.detail: Manager, pocket, and owner execution-facing surfaces now prefer active truth rather than latest-generated truth.

findings.title: Pocket task drill-in is still indirect
findings.detail: My Shift task clicks still do not open a task-native work context.

findings.title: Phase 5 closure still needs a refreshed audit
findings.detail: Role depth improved, but Phase 6 should not be marked closed until the workflow-truth audit is rerun formally.
